title: Diarise Anti-Bullying Academy colour fun run
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The non-profit organisation, the Anti-Bullying Academy, is hosting its annual colour fun run on Saturday, 30 March, at Hartenbos Beach.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The non-profit organisation, the Anti-Bullying Academy, is hosting its annual colour fun run on Saturday, 30 March, at Hartenbos Beach."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Entries can be done from 07:30 and the race will start at 08:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There will be four waterholes/colour points. The annual run is organised by Karen Gray and Deon Lensing as a fundraiser in aid of the Anti-Bullying Academy.","html":"There will be four waterholes/colour points. The annual run is organised by Karen Gray and Deon Lensing as a fundraiser in aid of the Anti-Bullying Academy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Businesses can advertise at the four colour points by using marketing material, gazebos and giving the runners refreshments.","html":"Businesses can advertise at the four colour points by using marketing material, gazebos and giving the runners refreshments."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The personnel of the business will then have the opportunity to throw the coloured powder on the runners, have fun and advertise their business. The colour powder will be supplied.","html":"The personnel of the business will then have the opportunity to throw the coloured powder on the runners, have fun and advertise their business. The colour powder will be supplied."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The academy aids in fighting bullying by helping bullies and the victims of bullying."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, call 081 896 6090 or 078 082 5725 or visit www.theantibullyingacadamy.org.","html":"For more information, call 081 896 6090 or 078 082 5725 or visit www.theantibullyingacadamy.org."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Diarise Anti-Bullying Academy colour fun run
